දැවීලා තැවීලා හා
නැසීලා Love  වීලා මා
සෑදීලා පේවීලා කෙරුව
පෙමක වීලා තෘතීක මා
අවරට බැලුම් බලාං
හිටගෙන ලපං ගහාං
පද නැති බෙරේ පලාගෙන
ගෑණී යන්ට ගියා මල කෝලාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....

උඹගේ රට හාවා .,
මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා .,
ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් //
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

හිටවලා ඇති දැන් බතල කටින්
කරලම තියෙන්නේ පවම කයින්
දිරවන් නැති උබේ අමුතු ලයින්
වැඩි පුර කිව්වොත් දෙන්නේ පයින්
හය හත වෙනකොට දාගෙන කඩේ
බොරුහිල තිබ්බට උලුදුයි වඩේ
නාටක පෙන්නන් ආවට නඩේ
මැද්දට පැනලා කියපන් "අඩේ"

මුලින්ම දැක්කම පෙම් හමුවීම
ආංගානියේ තුරුලට වීම
ඇලීම ගැලීම වෙලීම තැවීම
අඩ අඩ බලපං දෙවෙනි ඉනිම
බදින්නේ ගහං තොරාං
ණයයිලු හතර වරාං
ලැබුනොත් දේව වරාම්
නුඹ දක්කං යන්නම් මගේ කොරාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....
උඹගේ රට හාවා ., මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා ., ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් 
මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම්  පිස්සුවක් බන්

නුඹ දක්කං යන්නම් මගේ කොරාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....
උඹගේ රට හාවා ., මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා ., ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් 
මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම්  පිස්සුවක් බන්

snippet.title: Harith Wijeratne - Hemin Sare Piya Wida (හෙමින් සෑරේ) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

en-GB.description:
மாஸ்டர் - வாத்தி கம்மிங் | தளபதி விஜய் | அனிருத் ரவிச்சந்தர் | லோகேஷ் கனகராஜ்

Make way for the extraordinary #ThalapathyKuthu! Our #VaathiComing right here from #Thalapathy's #Master! Loaded with the ultra-catchy rhythms and the Thara-local slang , listen to this #Anirudh dance number on loop! 

Watch the official Tamil song video here !

Stream Master Songs Now - https://SMI.lnk.to/MasterAlbum

snippet.title: බිරිද වයසයි,විරූපියි කියලා කමෙන්ට් දාපු මිනිස්සුන්ට ගායක දිනේෂ් තරංග දුන්නු සංවේදී පිලිතුර. Dinesh
snippet.description:
අදටත් මා නිසාම හුස්ම ගන්නා නුඹ...
ලබන භවයේදී.... මාගේ බිරිඳ නොව...
මාගේ "අම්මා" වන්න මැණික!!
අපේ මිනිස්සු මේ තරම් කුහක ඇයි දෙයියනේ..මේවා දකිද්දී දිනේෂ්ට කොච්චර රිදෙන්න ඇතිද..
මේ දිනවල ජනප්‍රියම ගායක දිනේෂ් තරංග ඔහුගේ බිරිදගේ බාහිර පෙනුම ගැන සමාජ ජාලා වලින් එල්ල වූ අපහාස විවේචන වලට දුන්නු සංවේදී පිලිතුර. Dinesh Tharanga

ඔයාගේ ඇස් දෙක
දිහා බලන් මම
කියන්නේ කොහොමද 
යන්න යන බව

ඔයාගේ අත්දෙක

snippet.title: මිලියන 20ක ආදරය දිනූ ෂුක්රා පළමු වරට හෙළි කළ අඳුරු අතීතය.| Lakshapathi - සිරස ලක්ෂපති ජයග්‍රාහිකාව
snippet.description:
🔺 මෙවර සිරස ලක්ෂපති වැඩසටහනේ මිලියන 2 ජයග්‍රහණය කළ ගාල්ලේ පදිංචි 17 හැවිරිදි වියේ පසුවන ෂුක්රා මුනව්වර් සමග නිව්ස්ෆස්ට් කළ විශේෂ කතා බහ..

🔺 Exclusive interview with the winner of Sirasa Lakshapathi, Shukra Munawwar, from Katugoda, Galle

02:25 ෂුක්රා ඔබේ නම හරියටම උච්චාරණය කරන්නේ කොහොමද? 
03:00 මිලියන 02 මිලියන 20ක් කියලා පැටලුණු හේතුව මෙන්න..
04:50 ලැප්ටොප් හීනය..
06:45 ගොඩක් අවස්ථාවල මම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප වීම්වලට ලකවුණු කෙනෙක්..
08:15 ලක්ෂපති මුලින්ම බලපු විදිය..
10:06 11 වසර වෙනකොට ෂුක්රා වෙනස් වුණා?
12:30 පොඩි කාලේ ඉදලම දුප්පත් ජීවිතයක් ගත කළේ..
13:30 මේ රටේ දුප්පත් දරුවන්ට තියෙන ලොකුම ප්‍රශ්නය ඔන්ලයින් අධ්‍යාපනය
16:00 අමු ඉරටුවලට ෂුක්රාගෙන් පණිවිඩයක්
18:10 රට ජාතිය ගැන ඇති වූ හැඟීම අහම්බයක්ද?
18:55 ලංකාව දියුණු කරන්න ෂුක්රාගෙන් යෝජනාවක්?
21:45 කාන්තා සංවිධානයක පිරිමිත් ඉන්න ඕන..
23:40 ෂුක්රාගේ ඊළඟ ඉලක්කය?
24:41 සල්ලි කොහොමත් හම්බ කරන්න පුළුවන්..
25:45 මට හරියට නිදාගන්න වෙලාවක් නෑ..
27:08 අපි ලෝකෙම දන්න ජාතියක් වෙමු!

10:06 11 වසර වෙනකොට ෂුක්රා වෙනස් වුණා?
12:30 පොඩි කාලේ ඉදලම දුප්පත් ජීවිතයක් ගත කළේ..
13:30 මේ රටේ දුප්පත් දරුවන්ට තියෙන ලොකුම ප්‍රශ්නය ඔන්ලයින් අධ්‍යාපනය
16:00 අමු ඉරටුවලට ෂුක්රාගෙන් පණිවිඩයක්
18:10 රට ජාතිය ගැන ඇති වූ හැඟීම අහම්බයක්ද?
18:55 ලංකාව දියුණු කරන්න ෂුක්රාගෙන් යෝජනාවක්?
21:45 කාන්තා සංවිධානයක පිරිමිත් ඉන්න ඕන..
23:40 ෂුක්රාගේ ඊළඟ ඉලක්කය?
24:41 සල්ලි කොහොමත් හම්බ කරන්න පුළුවන්..
25:45 මට හරියට නිදාගන්න වෙලාවක් නෑ..
27:08 අපි ලෝකෙම දන්න ජාතියක් වෙමු!

snippet.title: "සංගීතේ" මලිතයා සහ රොකී ගේ රහස් හෙළි කළේ කවුද? | Kelum Devanarayana & Shanaka Udeesha | Music Pickle
snippet.description:
Music Pickle මේ සතියේ Program එකට අපි එකතුකර ගත්තේ ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආදරය කරන චරිත දෙකක්. ඒ Derana Dream Star ඔස්සේ ගායන ක්ෂේත්‍රයට පැමිණ, මේ දිනවල "සංගීතේ" ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ "Rockey” ගේ චරිතයෙන් ඔබ හමුවට එන ශානක උදීශ සහ "සංගීතේ" ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ කාගේත් හුරතලා වන "මලිතයා" ලෙසින් ඔබ හමුවට එන, TikTok ඔස්සේ ඉතාමත් ජනප්‍රිය කැළුම් දේවනාරායන.මොවුන් දෙදෙනාගේ තවත් විශේෂත්වයක් තියෙනවා.   "සංගීතේ" හි ප්‍රධාන චරිතයට ‍රංගන දායකත්වය ලබා දෙන ලවන් අභිෂේක් ගේ සැබෑ ජීවිතේ අයියා තමයි ශානක.ඒ වගේම සංගීතේ ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ ලවන් කරන චරිතය වන මහීගේ මල්ලි මලිතයා ගේ චරිතය කරන්නේ කැලුම්. ඉතින් අපි හිතුවා ඒ දෙන්නව එකට දකින්න ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආසාවෙන් ඇති කියලා. Program එකේදි ලවන් අභිෂේක්ව සහ සමාජ මාධ්‍ය ඔස්සේ ඉතාමත් ජනප්‍රිය ලෝචනා ජයකොඩිව ද දුරකතනය ඔස්සේ එකතු කරගෙන මේ දෙන්නා ගැන ඔබ නොදන්න ‍රස රහස් ගොන්නක්ම දැනගන්නත් අපි අමතක කළේ නෑ.ඒ හැම රසකතාවක්ම දැනගන්න අදත් Music Pickle සමගින් එකතුවෙන්න.


Production Manager : Samith Roshan
Producer : Dilini Madusanka Perera
Assistant Producer : Charitha Gangewaththa
Director of Photography : Dammika Dissanayake
Camera Operator : Amayuru Withanage | Shiran Wimukthi
Editor | Colorist : Dasun Prabhashwara
Head of Post Production : Vishwa Abhishek

localized.title: "සංගීතේ" මලිතයා සහ රොකී ගේ රහස් හෙළි කළේ කවුද? | Kelum Devanarayana & Shanaka Udeesha | Music Pickle
localized.description:
Music Pickle මේ සතියේ Program එකට අපි එකතුකර ගත්තේ ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආදරය කරන චරිත දෙකක්. ඒ Derana Dream Star ඔස්සේ ගායන ක්ෂේත්‍රයට පැමිණ, මේ දිනවල "සංගීතේ" ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ "Rockey” ගේ චරිතයෙන් ඔබ හමුවට එන ශානක උදීශ සහ "සංගීතේ" ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ කාගේත් හුරතලා වන "මලිතයා" ලෙසින් ඔබ හමුවට එන, TikTok ඔස්සේ ඉතාමත් ජනප්‍රිය කැළුම් දේවනාරායන.මොවුන් දෙදෙනාගේ තවත් විශේෂත්වයක් තියෙනවා.   "සංගීතේ" හි ප්‍රධාන චරිතයට ‍රංගන දායකත්වය ලබා දෙන ලවන් අභිෂේක් ගේ සැබෑ ජීවිතේ අයියා තමයි ශානක.ඒ වගේම සංගීතේ ටෙලිනාට්‍යයේ ලවන් කරන චරිතය වන මහීගේ මල්ලි මලිතයා ගේ චරිතය කරන්නේ කැලුම්. ඉතින් අපි හිතුවා ඒ දෙන්නව එකට දකින්න ඔයාලා ගොඩාක් ආසාවෙන් ඇති කියලා. Program එකේදි ලවන් අභිෂේක්ව සහ සමාජ මාධ්‍ය ඔස්සේ ඉතාමත් ජනප්‍රිය ලෝචනා ජයකොඩිව ද දුරකතනය ඔස්සේ එකතු කරගෙන මේ දෙන්නා ගැන ඔබ නොදන්න ‍රස රහස් ගොන්නක්ම දැනගන්නත් අපි අමතක කළේ නෑ.ඒ හැම රසකතාවක්ම දැනගන්න අදත් Music Pickle සමගින් එකතුවෙන්න.

snippet.title: Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching
snippet.description:
Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model, and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam, and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). In the same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

snippet.title: Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks！明日除夕，挂灯笼、贴对联、备好年货过大年啦！丨Liziqi Channel
snippet.description:
Please  subscribe to 【李子柒 Liziqi 】Liziqi Channel on YouTube if you like my videos: https://goo.gl/nkjpSx 
#李子柒#Liziqi#lýtửthấ#ChineseCuisine #ChineseFood

Tomorrow is Chinese New Year’s Eve! 
We put up lanterns, paste Spring Festival couplets, and do shopping and stock up for the new year!
Another year is dawning!
Chinese New Year’s decorations, goods and snacks are ready for the big day.
Melon seeds, peanuts, candied haws, Sanzi (fried dough twists), and fried prawn crackers, to name a few.
A big hug for those who can’t get together with their families back in the hometown.
I’m convinced that infinite hope and luck
are sure to come in 2021!
一年又到头啦！
年俗、年货小零食做起来准备过大年喽～
瓜子 花生 糖葫芦、馓子 虾片走起来！
给所有没回家就地过年的小伙伴们大大的拥抱
我相信，生生不息的希望和好运
一定会和2021一起到来


 【李子柒 Liziqi 】 https://goo.gl/nkjpSx

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.description:

CAST
Viraj Randika
https://www.facebook.com/virajrandikax
https://www.instagram.com/virajrandikax
Shithila Disanayaka
https://www.facebook.com/shithila
Shilanka Madhusanka
https://www.facebook.com/shilanka87
Kavini Chamathka

Cinematography - Viraj Randika
Production Manager - Shilanka Madhusanka
Screen Play - Shithila Dissanayaka
Music Arrangements - Fortune Films Studio
Colourist , Edit and Directed by  @Viraj Randika  

Special Thanks
Adhikaramge Lahiru Munasinghe
Adhikaramge Madushi Samyadasa
Sriya Gunasekara
Lalith Amarasinghe
Harini Kamalka

Song we Used
Sundori Komola (Bengali Folk Song)

lyrics -
Valo koira bajao go dhakuya
- O drummer.. beat the drum real hard
Sundori komola naache...
- Beautiful girl is dancing on the beat
Arey valo koira bajao go dhakuya
- O drummer.. beat the drum real hard
Sundori komola nache...
- Beautiful girl is dancing on the beat

snippet.title: Diwyangana (දිව්‍යාංගනා) - Gihan Vithanage (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Diwyangana (දිව්‍යාංගනා) - Gihan Vithanage (Official Music Video)

Connect with DesawanaMusic: 👉 http://bit.ly/YoTubeDesawanaMusic

♪ Director - Roshan Waduge
♪ Artist - Gihan Vithanage
♪ Music - @Nilan Fernando 
♪ Lyrics - Dhanushka Gunathilaka
♪ Music Label - Desawana Music
♪ Editor - Roshan Waduge
♪ Colorist - Yashodha Dhanupama
♪ Dop - Srinika Liyanage
♪ Production - CINEMA AVELA
♪ MUA - Sherin
♪ Cast - Nethmi Roshel Rogers, Nipun Fernando, Sudath Anthony, Priyanka Gangodawila, Anupa Hettiarachchi

♪Stream the Full Song Here♪
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/lk/album/diwyangana-single/1551762914
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3EUmaNLxyhdrWJaY5BTkzi
Deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/204801022
Yandex Music: https://music.yandex.com/album/13726500
Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B08VN8F6DQ

Song Lyrics: 
සීත පිණි බිංදු මන්දාරමේ
ඔබේ රුවින් මත් වෙලා..
පාට මල් අතර සිත්තම් කලේ..
ඔබේ රුවයි හිතෙනවා..

දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ..
පන වාගෙ මං රකිනවා..
දිව්‍යාංගනා ඔබ ද මේ විශ්වයෙ..
මගෙ වෙන්න මටමම මැවූ..
නෙත් බන්දනා රූපෙ හිමිකරු ඔබේ..
මම නේද මියෙනා තුරූ..

සංසාරයේ පුරුදු බැල්මෙන් නුරා..
මගේ හිතම සුවපත් කලා..
ඇහිබැම්ම දේදුන්න සේ පායලා ..
මගෙ හිත් අහසෙ ඔබ ඉන්නවා ..
දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ..පන වාගෙ මං රකිනවා

හදවතෙහි ඉඩ තියෙන අස්සක් පුරා ..
ඔබේ රූපෙ මිහිදන් වෙලා...
වෑහෙද්දි සුදු පාට කම්මුල් පුරා ...
මනමාලයි ඔබේ පෙම් හිනා
දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ...
පනවාගෙ මං රකිනවා ...

snippet.title: Master - Kutti Story Video | Thalapathy Vijay | Anirudh Ravichander | Lokesh Kanagaraj
snippet.description:

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. snippet.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩකයින්ගේ Fitness මැන බලයි | Sri Lanka National Squad performs the ‘2 KM’ Fitness test
snippet.description:
Sri Lanka Cricket today launched the ‘2 KM Run Fitness Test’ for the National Players to ascertain their fitness levels. Accordingly, 32 of the players out of a 36 member provisional squad training for the Tour of West Indies, which is under discussion, participated in the test, which was conducted at the Sugathadasa Stadium.

The new test, a standard method of determining the ‘Fitness and Endurance’ levels of athletes, replaced the Yo-Yo method adopted by Sri Lanka Cricket. According to the new test, players were given a target of running the 2 Kilometer distance within a time frame of 8 minutes and 35 seconds.

Video Credits - Sri Lanka Cricket

More Info - http://bit.ly/ThePapareCricket

snippet.title: Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies
snippet.description:
Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). The same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

ආයු කාලේ නිමා වෙන්නට කලියෙන් ගෙන ආව
කවුරු කවුරුත් වෙහෙස වෙන්නේ අරමුණු වෙත යන්න
හොඳම කාලේ ගෙවී යනකොට ජීවිතයේ තියෙන
මගේ ලෝකේ රිදුණු තැන් වල වැඩිපුර හිටියෙ නුඹ

අමුතුම මලක් වාගෙ ලස්සනක් දැක්කෙ මං  ඔබ ගාවයි
ඒ සුන්දරත්වයට පැල්ලමක් එකතු වෙයි හරි ලෝබයි
ඔය අත් දෙකෙන් දුන්න ආදරේ රහට නම් තව ආසයි
හිත නිස්කලංකවම පැත්තකට වෙන්න දැන් අවස්ථාවයි

මෙන්න කියා පෙන්නුවත් හිතේ යට තියෙනා දේ මිනිසුන්ගේ
දන්න කෙනෙක් කොහෙවත් නෑ හරියට පොතේ පතේවත් නැහැනේ
සතුටයි සහ කඳුලයි මැද ඇත්තේ නූලක වෙනසයි

පින්න වැටී දිස්නයක් ගෙනාවට ඉර දැක්කම හැංගේවී
ඉන්න හිතපු අය ලඟින් ඉන්නවද යන්න හිතෙනකොට යාවී
ඔබවයි සහ මාවයි මේ සොබාදහමටත් මතකයි

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Danushka Joseph - Mage Manik Apsaravi (මගෙ මැණික් අප්සරාවී) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

snippet.title: Roshan Jayawardhane - Channa Kinnaravi (චන්න කින්නරාවී)  | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.description:
වික්ටර්ව විනාශ කළේ මේ ගැහැනිය,වික්ටර්ගෙ ගෙදර යද්දි බුදු පිළිමෙ නෑ

snippet.title: විදේශගත ලාංකික කතක් ගෝඨාගේ කලිසම ගලවයි
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team.

snippet.title: Prageeth Perera - Anurawee (අනුරාවී) Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Prageeth Perera - Anurawee (අනුරාවී) Official Music Video

● Artist: Prageeth Perera Ft. Skay Jay
● Music: Prageeth Perera
● Lyrics: Kelum Dissanayake
● Rap Lyrics: Skay Jay
● Director: Chamu Sri
● Dop: Srinika Liyanage
● Cast: RV Ravindu, Maneesha Amarasinghe
● Dance Choreography: RV Dance Studio

🎵 Stream/Download:
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/lk/album/anurawee-feat-skay-jay-single/1549445711
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/4VFoPkNPOCdeVX2QenvIXH
Deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/200808042
Yandex Music: https://music.yandex.com/album/13523643
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B08T88SVH6

Lyrics:
ඈ ශෘංගාරෙන් මත්වීලා
ස්වර්ග රසේද මවා ගෙනල්ලා
හැඟුම් පුරෝලා
රෑ තුන් යාමේ රඟදේවී 
රාග කසාය මුවින් නොඉල්ලා
ඉඟිබිඟි පාලා
අවසානේ නොවෙයි මේ ඇරඹුමයි
මගේ පෙම් කතාවේ
ජීවත්වෙනතුරු මෙමා ඔබ නමින්
හුස්ම ගැහුනාවේ..//

මේ විශල් නිශායමේ සුපෙම් නුරාගයේ
ඒ දෙතොල් පුරා මැවී සියුම් නුරා රසේ
මා හදේ කපාටයේ නැඟී රතී සුවේ
සාදරෙන් කතා උනේ සුසුම් අපේ ප්‍රේමා ගින්නේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

Rap
රසේ මතු කරන ඇගේ ලතාවන්
මගේ මනස තුල ඇඳෙයි රටාවන්
මලේ සුවඳ මත වශී උනා මං
අපේ කතාවේ ඔයා විලාසිතාව
රඟදේවී දෙතොල් මැද තනිවේවී
මත්‍ රස නෙත් අග මං පැටලේවී
මත් උන සිතුවිලි දැන් ගලාව්ඒවී
කලඹාවී සිත මගෙ අනුරාවී

සායමින් වැසූ ඇගේ කොපුල් තටාකයේ
පීනමින් සරාගයේ ලැබූ සුමෝහනේ
ප්‍රේමනීය සෘතුවේ හැමූ සරාලියේ
මේ වසන්තයයි අපේ විඳින්න එක්වෙන්න ජීවිතේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

ඈ ශෘංගාරෙන් මත්වීලා....

▶ Subscribe To Official Channel: https://bit.ly/YTSubscribePrageethPerera
▶ Like Us On Facebook: https://bit.ly/PrageethPereraOfficial

Enjoy & Stay Connected With Us For More Videos !!!

#PrageethPerera #Anurawee #SinhalaSongs #SinhalaVideoSongs

මත්‍ රස නෙත් අග මං පැටලේවී
මත් උන සිතුවිලි දැන් ගලාව්ඒවී
කලඹාවී සිත මගෙ අනුරාවී

සායමින් වැසූ ඇගේ කොපුල් තටාකයේ
පීනමින් සරාගයේ ලැබූ සුමෝහනේ
ප්‍රේමනීය සෘතුවේ හැමූ සරාලියේ
මේ වසන්තයයි අපේ විඳින්න එක්වෙන්න ජීවිතේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

ඈ ශෘංගාරෙන් මත්වීලා....

snippet.title: #VadiveluComedy  முரட்டு குடிகாரனா இருப்பான் போலயே இந்த நாத்தம் நாறுது | Best Comedy Video HD
snippet.description:
#VadiveluNonStopComedyHD #CheenaThaana001 #CheenaThaana007 #ManivannanMovieComedyVideoHD #PrasanaMovieComedyVideoHD

#VadiveluComedy எவளோ நேக்கா கொத்து விட்டுபோய்ட்டான், மனுஷனுக்கு புது புது வியாதியா வருதே நா என்ன பண்ணுவேன் | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley
Story by Udayakrishna-Siby K. Thomas
Starring Prasanna
Sheela
Vadivelu
Livingston
Manivannan
Riyaz Khan
Delhi Ganesh
Music by Deva
Cinematography Raja Rajan
Edited by N. Ganesh
Production
company 
Mid Valley Entertainment
Release date 
7 September 2007

සූදුරු තේ හැඳි 1/2

පොල් තෙල්

snippet.description:
මේ සතියේ B&B What's in My Bag Segment එකට අපිත් එක්ක එකතු වෙන්නේ දෙරණ නාලිකාවේ විකාශනය වන "සිදු" නාට්‍යයේ "රුක්ෂි" ගේ චරිතයට පන පොවන ඉතා හුරුබුහුටි නවක නිළියක් වන අමන්දා ජයරත්න.

snippet.title: Magnificent Mayers 210* in Stunning Win! | Bangladesh v West Indies Day 5 1st Test - Highlights
snippet.description:
Test debutant Kyle Mayers hit an incredible unbeaten 210 as West Indies completed the fifth highest run chase in Test history against Bangladesh in Chittagong. The Windies chased down 395 to win by three wickets, with 15 balls remaining in the final hour of the first Test.

This is the official channel for the West Indies cricket team, providing all the latest highlights, interviews and features to keep you up to date with all things Windies. 

Subscribe to the channel here!
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2MHTOXktfTK26aDKyQs3cQ?view_as=subscriber

Find out more about the Windies at:
http://Windiescricket.com

snippet.description:
අපේ නිදහස - කාගම සිරිනන්ද හිමියන් සමග කල සාකච්ජාව Our Freedom - Interview with Ven. Kagama Thero
#Ven_Kagama_Sirinanda_Thero #කාගම_සිරිනන්ද_හිමියන් #Our_Freedom

Welcome to Ven Kagama Sirinanda Thero you tube channel, we Viharadhipathi of Pirimaniyagama Siri Samadhi Viharaya and Founder of Siri Samadhi Buddhist Counseling Center. The Most Venerable Kagama Sirinanda Thero (Galkiriyagama Hamuduruwo) preached the Dhamma sermons on how to lead the people of Sri Lanka and the world in good ways and see them in the life of true Buddhism and fulfilling their duty as a true human being.


_____________________
Do subscribe to our channel so that you don’t miss out on #Ven Kagama Sirinanda Thero you tube channel !

snippet.description:

Infinix Smart HD 2021 Specs

6.1” HD+ Drop Notch display, 19.5:9 Aspect ratio, LCD IPS, 500 NITS, 85% Screen to body ratio, In-Cell, Eye Care mode, 720*1560 resolution, 1200:1 Contrast Ratio
"8MP (f 2.0), Dual LED Flash
Picture Modes : Auto Scene detection, Portrait, AI HDR, AI Beauty, PanoramaVideo Modes: FHD Video recording"
"5MP (f 2.0) AI Selfie with Dual LED Flash. Front Camera Modes: AI HDR, AI Beauty, WideSelfie, PortraitVideo Modes: FHD Video recording"
5000mAh(35hrs 4G Talk-, 25 hrs Music Playback (Speakers), 28 hrs Video Playback (Headset,720p), 121 hrs Music (Headset), 12 hrs Web Surfing, 14 hrs Gaming, 34 days Standby time)
XOS v6.2 based on Android 10 (Go Edition)
195 gm, 158.3 * 75.17 * 9.8 mm 
Helio A20 (12nm) Quad-Core 64 bit processor, 1.8 Ghz, GPU – IMG GE8300
2GB + 32GB
3 Slots (Dual nano SIM + Micro SD).
Dedicated memory card slot . Expandable memory upto 256GB
G-SENSOR/PROXIMITY SENSOR/FINGERPRINT/Ambient Light
Fingerprint sensor & Face Unlock
DTS Surround Sound
BT 5.0, GPS, WiFi2.4G，WiFi5G，FM
GSM/GPRS/EDGE- B2/3/5/8; WCDMA - B1/5/8; LTE - B1/3/5/7/8/20/B38/B40/B41
Dual VoLTE, VoWiFi Enabled
Obsidian Black,Quartz Green ,Topaz Blue
Gem Cut Texture design
In box - Adaptor, Micro USB Cable, Protective Film, TPU Case, UM, Warranty Card

snippet.title: Lakai Sikai - TO Mahaththaya | ලකයි සිකයි - ටී ඕ මහත්තයා
snippet.description:
Relax with Lakai Sikai.... 
Script & Director - Lakmal Weerasiri (ලකා) |
Line Producer - Shan Arosha(සිකා) |
DOP - Madawa Kamalasiri |
Audio Production - Thameera Maduranga |
Editor & Colourist -  | Damith Sameera 
Production Manager - Shiraz Merza |
Production Assistant - Sachindu Dilshan |
Marketing - Dilan Rajapaksha |

snippet.title: வருந்துகிறோம் ! | சகோ.A. அப்பாத்துரை கர்த்தருக்குள் நித்திரையடைந்தார்கள் !
snippet.description:
வருந்துகிறோம் ! | சகோ.A. அப்பாத்துரை கர்த்தருக்குள் நித்திரையடைந்தார்கள் !

OBITUARY ANNOUNCEMENT

Jesus Redeems family is deeply saddened to inform  that Bro. A. Appadurai,  Trustee, Jesus Redeems Ministries, finished his race and has left for his heavenly abode. 

Requesting your prayers for his family members

Funeral service will be held on Monday (08.02.2021) @ 9AM at CSI Church, Shanthi Nagar, Palayamkottai 

Deeply mourned by,
Bro. Mohan C Lazarus & Staffs of Jesus Redeems Ministry, Newlife Society & Good Samaritan Club.


#Rip #appadurai #சகோஅப்பாத்துரை #trustee  #bro_appadurai #jesusredeems 

Visit us @ https://www.jesusredeems.com

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario - The Reality | Jump Cuts | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Make meaningful connections without stepping out of your house. Download happn now :
http://gethap.pn/Iw5k
--
For Business Enquiries : jumpcuts16@gmail.com
___________________________________

Have you had a savage ghost video or ghost in the house? Jump Cuts presents a video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. 

Suddenly, he sees Ramesh standing there. His body shivered with fear. Ramesh kept his hand on his friend’s shoulder and was about to tell a secret. Just when he opened his mouth, the phone rang. It’s Ramesh’s mother’s call. He learns from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

Why did Ramesh call his friend to the terrace? What secret does he want to say? 

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario” - a scary short video. Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #ghostinhouse #Jumpcuts
___________________________________

Cast : Hari Baskar
Ghost : Naresh Dillibabu
Directed by: Naresh Dillibabu 
Music : Surya Srini
Cinematography : Jerin Auxilium
Editor : Vignesh Chakkaravarthy 
DI : Vishal 
Dubbing : Nijil Dhinakaran
Production Manager : Hari Prasad 
Team : Karthik & Prithivee
Thumbnail by : Gopinath
Media partner : Divo

snippet.title: 🤯 LATE COMEBACK DRAMA! | HIGHLIGHTS | Granada 3-5 Barça
snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. In the additional 30 minutes, Ronald Koeman's side secured their place in the semi-finals with goals from Griezmann, De Jong and Jordi Alba to seal victory! Check out the highlights!

snippet.title: මරා විමල්ට කුණුහරපෙන් බැනවදී
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we’re going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let’s head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don’t need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle — you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 — Perfectly round crepes
2:02 — No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 — Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 — DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 — A way to cut package tape 
8:12 — DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.
